completed_tasks.name: Detect active context and select handoff target
Verify layer-parity implementation from live code (not docs)
Run build and automated test checks
Assess launch readiness blockers
completed_tasks.progress: Code-level features and tests pass, but launch blockers remain (production config, full E2E proof, dirty workspace).

remaining_tasks.name: Finalize go/no-go with end-to-end 5-layer validation evidence

blockers.description: Production config is not launch-safe: system.debug=true and system.salt is placeholder in config.yaml.
blockers.workaround: Prepare production config/secrets and set debug=false before release.

blockers.description: Full paid-ad to final-conversion E2E path was not executed against live services in this session.
blockers.workaround: Run staged/manual E2E with PostgreSQL/Valkey/ClickHouse and real redirect/pixel paths.

blockers.description: Repository has 685 uncommitted changes (many unrelated deletions/edits), increasing release risk.
blockers.workaround: Isolate verification branch/clean worktree before launch decision.

human_actions_pending.action: Set production-safe config values and secrets
human_actions_pending.context: Launch cannot be approved with debug=true and placeholder salt.

human_actions_pending.action: Run/record manual E2E validation across all 5 layers
human_actions_pending.context: Automated tests pass, but launch readiness needs full click-to-conversion path proof.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide canonical planning path between 8-layer-parity and 08-layer-parity
human_actions_pending.context: Dual phase directories create resumption ambiguity.

decisions.decision: Treat docs/reports as untrusted and verify against live code and test execution.
decisions.rationale: Existing planning docs contain contradictions and placeholders.
It is the most recently active phase path with an existing .continue-here.md.

decisions.decision: Mark launch readiness as blocked until production config and E2E evidence are complete.
decisions.rationale: Passing unit/build checks alone is insufficient for launch decision.

next_action: Resume by producing a strict layer-by-layer launch verdict with explicit PASS/BLOCK for each layer, then run/record missing E2E checks.
context_notes: Verification was re-started from scratch due stale/outdated docs. Code-level parity signals are strong for layers 1-4, but launch decision is intentionally blocked pending production-safe config and end-to-end evidence.
